case_title: JESSE L. ROTHENBURGER VS. NICHOLAS LABARBERA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED JUN-30-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LABARBERA, NICHOLAS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROTHENBURGER, JESSE L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LABARBERA, NICHOLAS CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JESSE L. ROTHENBURGER IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS RACHAEL STRICKLER. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS LABARBERA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS COLBY WAGGLE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,832.00 FILED BY ROTHENBURGER, JESSE L. AS TO DEFENDANT LABARBERA, NICHOLAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
